title.source: How to manage your User Account?
title.target: How to manage your User Account?

body:0002.source: Your account is your personal gateway to engaging on the platform. It includes your profile details, preferences, and a record of your activity. Knowing how to manage your account gives you more control over what you share, what you receive, and how visible you are to others in the community.
body:0002.target: Your account is your personal gateway to engaging on the platform. It includes your profile details, preferences, and a record of your activity. Knowing how to manage your account gives you more control over what you share, what you receive, and how visible you are to others in the community.

body:0009.source: Your Activity Page is your personal dashboard that displays your engagement history. It helps you keep track of your contributions to public discussions and initiatives.
body:0009.target: Your Activity Page is your personal dashboard that displays your engagement history. It helps you keep track of your contributions to public discussions and initiatives.

body:0011.source: Your name, profile photo, join date, and bio
body:0011.target: Your name, profile photo, join date, and bio

body:0012.source: Metrics on participation (number of ideas submitted, proposals, comments, followed projects, and events attended)
body:0012.target: Metrics on participation (number of ideas submitted, proposals, comments, followed projects, and events attended)

body:0013.source: This information helps build transparency and visibility within the community.
body:0013.target: This information helps build transparency and visibility within the community.

body:0015.source: Other users can see your profile, ideas, comments, and proposals. However:
body:0015.target: Other users can see your profile, ideas, comments, and proposals. However:

body:0017.source: Survey responses are not currently shown in the activity feed.
body:0017.target: Survey responses are not currently shown in the activity feed.

body:0019.source:
Submissions tab
View and edit all ideas you’ve submitted.
body:0019.target:
Submissions tab
View and edit all ideas you’ve submitted.

body:0020.source:
Responses tab
Find all your survey responses and download your answers.
body:0020.target:
Responses tab
Find all your survey responses and download your answers.

body:0021.source:
Comments tab
See and edit the comments you’ve posted on ideas.
body:0021.target:
Comments tab
See and edit the comments you’ve posted on ideas.

body:0022.source:
Following tab
View all projects, inputs, folders, topics, and areas you follow. You can unfollow items or update your topic/area selections.
body:0022.target:
Following tab
View all projects, inputs, folders, topics, and areas you follow. You can unfollow items or update your topic/area selections.

body:0023.source:
Events tab
See all events you’re registered for.
body:0023.target:
Events tab
See all events you’re registered for.

body:0024.source: How to edit your profile and personal data?
body:0024.target: How to edit your profile and personal data?

body:0026.source: Click on your name in the top-right corner of the screen.
body:0026.target: Click on your name in the top-right corner of the screen.

body:0028.source: On the profile page, update any fields you wish to change.
body:0028.target: On the profile page, update any fields you wish to change.

body:0029.source: You can edit your name, profile picture, and other personal info.
body:0029.target: You can edit your name, profile picture, and other personal info.

body:0030.source: Your name and picture are visible to others.
body:0030.target: Your name and picture are visible to others.

body:0032.source: A green confirmation message will appear: "Your profile has been saved."
body:0032.target: A green confirmation message will appear: "Your profile has been saved."

body:0034.source: If your platform uses ID verification, some fields (e.g. domicile) may be pre-filled and uneditable due to verification requirements.
body:0034.target: If your platform uses ID verification, some fields (e.g. domicile) may be pre-filled and uneditable due to verification requirements.

body:0035.source: How to manage your notifications settings?
body:0035.target: How to manage your notifications settings?

body:0036.source: Click your name in the top-right corner and select "My Settings".
body:0036.target: Click your name in the top-right corner and select "My Settings".

body:0037.source: Scroll to the "Notifications" section at the bottom of the page.
body:0037.target: Scroll to the "Notifications" section at the bottom of the page.

body:0038.source: You’ll see 10 categories of notifications with sub-categories
body:0038.target: You’ll see 10 categories of notifications with sub-categories

body:0039.source: Expand the accordion next to each section to review sub-categories and update your preferences.
body:0039.target: Expand the accordion next to each section to review sub-categories and update your preferences.

body:0040.source: Adjust the settings to receive only the messages you care about.
body:0040.target: Adjust the settings to receive only the messages you care about.

body:0041.source: Which of your user data is visible on the platform?
body:0041.target: Which of your user data is visible on the platform?

body:0042.source: When you register an account on the platform, you gain access to features like submitting input, commenting, and participating in projects. While creating an account requires some personal data, only the most essential and basic details are visible to other users.
body:0042.target: When you register an account on the platform, you gain access to features like submitting input, commenting, and participating in projects. While creating an account requires some personal data, only the most essential and basic details are visible to other users.

body:0044.source: Every user has a public profile page. The following information may be visible to all users, both registered and unregistered:
body:0044.target: Every user has a public profile page. The following information may be visible to all users, both registered and unregistered:

body:0048.source: Any comments or submissions you've made on the platform
body:0048.target: Any comments or submissions you've made on the platform

body:0049.source: Your participation (e.g. comments or submissions) is visible on project pages, just like you can view others’ contributions.
body:0049.target: Your participation (e.g. comments or submissions) is visible on project pages, just like you can view others’ contributions.

body:0050.source: If you'd prefer to disable profile pictures across the entire platform, contact the support team via the chat bubble. Note: this will apply to all users on the platform.
body:0050.target: If you'd prefer to disable profile pictures across the entire platform, contact the support team via the chat bubble. Note: this will apply to all users on the platform.

body:0052.source: Platform admins, those managing and maintaining the platform, have access to additional data you've submitted during account registration or participation. This may include personal or demographic information, depending on the registration setup.
body:0052.target: Platform admins, those managing and maintaining the platform, have access to additional data you've submitted during account registration or participation. This may include personal or demographic information, depending on the registration setup.

body:0053.source: All data accessed by admins is handled in accordance with the platform’s Privacy Policy, which you agreed to when registering. You can revisit the Privacy Policy any time via the link in the website footer.
body:0053.target: All data accessed by admins is handled in accordance with the platform’s Privacy Policy, which you agreed to when registering. You can revisit the Privacy Policy any time via the link in the website footer.

body:0054.source: GDPR and cookies on the platform:
body:0054.target: GDPR and cookies on the platform:

body:0055.source: Go Vocal platforms are designed to be GDPR-compliant by default. This means:
body:0055.target: Go Vocal platforms are designed to be GDPR-compliant by default. This means:

body:0056.source: Analytical and functional cookies are not active unless you give explicit consent.
body:0056.target: Analytical and functional cookies are not active unless you give explicit consent.

body:0057.source: You can review or update your cookie preferences at any time to control what data is collected as you navigate the platform.
body:0057.target: You can review or update your cookie preferences at any time to control what data is collected as you navigate the platform.

body:0058.source: This helps ensure your privacy and gives you control over how your personal data is used.
body:0058.target: This helps ensure your privacy and gives you control over how your personal data is used.

body:0059.source: How to change and delete your data?
body:0059.target: How to change and delete your data?

body:0061.source: Click your name in the top-right corner and select ‘My Settings’.
body:0061.target: Click your name in the top-right corner and select ‘My Settings’.

body:0063.source: On your profile page, you can update your name, bio, and any other editable details. Keep in mind that your name and profile picture (if added) are visible to other users on the platform.
body:0063.target: On your profile page, you can update your name, bio, and any other editable details. Keep in mind that your name and profile picture (if added) are visible to other users on the platform.

body:0065.source: Click the red ‘Save changes’ button. A green confirmation message will appear: “Your profile has been saved.”
body:0065.target: Click the red ‘Save changes’ button. A green confirmation message will appear: “Your profile has been saved.”

body:0067.source: If you’re no longer comfortable sharing certain details, you can delete any optional fields in your profile.
body:0067.target: If you’re no longer comfortable sharing certain details, you can delete any optional fields in your profile.

body:0068.source: Edit and change your email and password:
body:0068.target: Edit and change your email and password:

body:0069.source: under the section Login credentials you can you can change your email or password here.
body:0069.target: under the section Login credentials you can you can change your email or password here.

body:0071.source: You may choose to fully delete your account if you no longer wish to participate. If you change your mind later, you can create a new account using the same email address.
body:0071.target: You may choose to fully delete your account if you no longer wish to participate. If you change your mind later, you can create a new account using the same email address.

body:0072.source: Click your name in the top-right corner and select ‘My Settings’. Scroll down to Delete your account section
body:0072.target: Click your name in the top-right corner and select ‘My Settings’. Scroll down to Delete your account section

body:0074.source: If your platform uses ID verification during registration, some fields, like domicile or other verified data, may be locked and not editable. This is because such data is pulled directly from the verification system to confirm your eligibility (e.g., residence in a specific municipality).
body:0074.target: If your platform uses ID verification during registration, some fields, like domicile or other verified data, may be locked and not editable. This is because such data is pulled directly from the verification system to confirm your eligibility (e.g., residence in a specific municipality).

body:0075.source: These fields are not editable by the user to ensure compliance and data integrity.
body:0075.target: These fields are not editable by the user to ensure compliance and data integrity.
